headline: Why The Tesco (LSE:TSCO) Story Is Shifting After The New £4.80 Price Target
summary: Tesco’s price target has been reset from £5.00 to £4.80, putting a fresh marker on how analysts are framing the shares right now. Recent commentary weighs this new level against expectations for valuation, execution and growth, with JPMorgan’s updated numbers sitting alongside wider sector views on consumer facing names. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets feed into the evolving narrative around Tesco and what it could mean for your own assessment of the stock. Stay...

headline: How The YPF Sociedad Anónima (BASE:YPFD) Narrative Is Shifting After JPMorgan Target Revision
summary: The latest talking point around YPF Sociedad Anónima is JPMorgan’s US$3 price target increase, which sits alongside an updated fair value estimate of ARS 84,420. Analysts are using this move to debate how much of the current story is already reflected in that ARS 84,420 mark and how much still comes down to day-to-day execution. Read on to see how you can track this evolving narrative and what to watch as new information comes through. Stay updated as the Fair Value for YPF Sociedad Anónima...
